title: OS Harness Registry
description: The component system of record: every component row + its schema + health. The rails (states, kinds, boundary, sequence, chain, environment, governance) live in harness/manifest.json. The drift-check (governance/enforcement/doctor.mjs) merges both and validates reality against them. Each non-planned component also carries a co-located contract.json (attached on promotion).

updated.description: ISO date of last manual edit

type.description: The canonical component type = its folder under harness/ (orchestrators|runners|services|hooks|lib).

path.description: Current location on disk (relative to repo root). Pre-relocation paths are allowed; the manifest+registry, not the directory, define the boundary.

flags.description: Known governance gaps surfaced by the doctor

version.description: Contract-keyed semver of this component (MAJOR = input/output/exit break). Equals versions[last].version. Optional until P1-c enforcement.

versions.description: Append-only version history; the structured source the co-located CHANGELOG.md is generated from.
